tools.name: list_all_components
tools.description: List all available Lightswind components, optionally filtered by category.

tools.name: get_component
tools.description: Retrieve the full React code and installation details for a specific component by name.

name.description: The exact name of the component.

tools.name: search_components
tools.description: Fuzzy search for components matching a query.

tools.name: list_categories
tools.description: List all component categories in Lightswind UI.

tools.name: get_block
tools.description: Retrieve the details and source code for a premium Pro template block.

tools.name: list_blocks
tools.description: List all available Pro template blocks.

tools.name: get_installation_guide
tools.description: Get setup instructions for Next.js, Vite, etc.

tools.name: get_usage_example
tools.description: Get a code usage example for a component.
